selections.name: Shining Moment (USA)
selections.reason: Drawn high on the 'Golden Highway' which is a massive advantage on Good to Firm ground. Wesley Ward runner with excellent raw speed.

selections.name: Alta Regina (IRE)
selections.reason: Wathnan Racing 2YO drawn extremely high. Fits the algorithmic upgrade angle perfectly and will relish the stands side rail.

selections.name: Victorious (IRE)
selections.reason: Aidan O'Brien elite yard upgrade. Despite the low draw, class and elite conditioning make her a major threat.

selections.name: More Champagne (USA)
selections.reason: Possesses the highest raw speed figure in the field. Middle-high draw gives her options to track the pace.

danger_horse.name: Ruiva (USA)
danger_horse.reason: Another Wesley Ward runner with strong early speed and a favorable middle-high draw.

selections.name: Galiyan
selections.reason: Top speed figure in the field. The middle-high draw is advantageous in this stamina-testing route to avoid early bottlenecks.

selections.name: Ravenspire (IRE)
selections.reason: Karl Burke runner offering value. Strong class rating and will appreciate the galloping nature of the round course.

selections.name: Port Of Spain (IRE)
selections.reason: Aidan O'Brien runner. Must apply the Royal Ascot elite yard upgrade. Will be primed for a massive effort.

selections.name: Del Maro (GER)
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and drawn low to save ground around the first sweeping bend.

danger_horse.name: Limestone (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Taking heavy market support (5/2). Class rating suggests he is better than his raw speed figure indicates.

selections.name: Cathedral
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly high for the straight mile on fast ground. Strong speed figures and will relish the uphill drag.

selections.name: Blue Bolt (IRE)
selections.reason: High class rating (119) and drawn well on the stands side. Will be closing strongly late.

selections.name: Godspeed (FR)
selections.reason: Top raw speed figure in the race. The high draw puts her right in the Golden Highway path.

selections.name: Friendly Soul
selections.reason: John & Thady Gosden runner. Elite yard upgrade applies. Classy filly who can overcome the middle-low draw.

danger_horse.name: Catalina Delcarpio (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Strong speed figures and capable of a big run if she can navigate from the low draw.

selections.name: Ombudsman (IRE)
selections.reason: Gosden runner with a massive 127 class rating. Elite yard upgrade makes him the clear one to beat.

selections.name: Daryz (FR)
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly low to save ground on the round course. High class rating (122) and strong recent form.

selections.name: Almaqam
selections.reason: Excellent inside draw to dictate terms or track the pace. Strong speed figures.

selections.name: Minnie Hauk (IRE)
selections.reason: Aidan O'Brien runner with the highest raw speed figure. Elite yard upgrade makes her a major player.

danger_horse.name: Mississippi River (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Another O'Brien runner. Capable of outrunning his massive odds if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Thunder Run (IRE)
selections.reason: Karl Burke runner drawn perfectly high (28) for the straight mile handicap. Fits the algorithmic upgrade perfectly.

selections.name: Blue Brother (FR)
selections.reason: Wathnan Racing runner drawn extremely high. Massive upgrade based on ownership angle and track bias.

selections.name: Rogue Diplomat (IRE)
selections.reason: Drawn highest of all (33). Will have the absolute best of the ground on the stands side rail.

selections.name: Shout (IRE)
selections.reason: Gosden runner drawn high. Elite yard upgrade combined with the Golden Highway bias.

danger_horse.name: Ebt's Guard
danger_horse.reason: Drawn 32, right on the stands side rail. Will be flying late up the uphill drag.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #10, Exacta Box 10-31, Trifecta 10,31 / 10,24,28,31 / ALL (High Draws)

selections.name: Rumba Numba
selections.reason: Roger Varian runner drawn high. Massive algorithmic ROI upgrade for this yard, perfectly drawn for the straight mile.

selections.name: Rhapsody (IRE)
selections.reason: Drawn highest of all (25). Will get the absolute best ground on the stands side.

selections.name: Gaga Girl (FR)
selections.reason: Excellent high draw (24). Should get a perfect tow into the race on the near side.

selections.name: Stateira (FR)
selections.reason: Wathnan Racing runner. Must apply the ownership upgrade despite the middle draw.

danger_horse.name: Miss Nightfall
danger_horse.reason: Drawn high (21) and offers value. Can hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Ruler's Control (IRE)
selections.reason: Aidan O'Brien 2YO drawn extremely high (23). The combination of elite yard and Golden Highway draw is lethal.

selections.name: King Of Cloughan (IRE)
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly high (22) for the straight sprint. Will appreciate the fast ground on the near side.

selections.name: Our Boy Bailey (IRE)
selections.reason: Another runner drawn high (21) who will benefit from the track bias.

selections.name: Sergei Diaghilev (IRE)
selections.reason: Aidan O'Brien favorite. Drawn low, which is a negative, but class and conditioning make him impossible to ignore.

danger_horse.name: Controlla (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Taking strong market support and has the highest speed figure, though drawn in the middle.
